zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Stapleton於1351年出生在英國越可爾貝達爾時，她的父親Sir Miles Stapleton II36歲，母親Joan Ingham38歲。她於1363年10月4日與Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1385年9月2日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴肯哈姆 帕瓦享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可英厄姆。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Stapleton was born in 1351, in Bedale, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Miles Stapleton II, was 36 and her mother, Joan Ingham, was 38. She married Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte on 4 October 1363. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 2 September 1385, in Buckenham Parva, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34, and was buried in Ingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Stapleton est née en 1351, à Bedale, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Miles Stapleton II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Joan Ingham, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte le 4 octobre 1363. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 septembre 1385, à Buckenham Parva, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Ingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Stapleton 1351 in Bedale, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Miles Stapleton II 36 und ihre Mutter Joan Ingham 38. Sie hat am 4. Oktober 1363 Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. September 1385 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Buckenham Parva, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Stapleton è nata il nel 1351 nel Bedale, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Miles Stapleton II, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Joan Ingham, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte il 4 ottobre 1363. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 2 settembre 1385, nel Buckenham Parva, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Ingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Stapletonが1351年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベダルで生まれた時，父Sir Miles Stapleton IIは36歳，母Joan Inghamは38歳であった。1363年10月4日にBaron John de Plaiz of Tofteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1385年9月2日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハム パーヴァで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクインガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Stapleton(이)가 1351년 영국 요르크실르 베데일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Miles Stapleton II(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Ingham(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1363년 10월 4일 Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1385년 9월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 벅함 파르바에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Stapleton nasceu em 1351, em Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Miles Stapleton II, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Joan Ingham, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte em 4 de outubro de 1363. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de setembro de 1385, em Buckenham Parva, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Stapleton родилась в 1351 г. в местности бедеил, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Miles Stapleton II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Ingham, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte 4 октября 1363 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 сентября 1385 г. в местности буккенам парва, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
